channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [OpenAI] Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
item.description: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows

item.title: [Hacker News] God Damn AI is making me dumb
item.description: God Damn AI is making me dumb

item.title: [Anthropic] 2028: Two scenarios for global AI leadership
item.description: 2028: Two scenarios for global AI leadership

item.title: [Hacker News] RTX 5090 and M4 MacBook Air: Can It Game?
item.description: RTX 5090 and M4 MacBook Air: Can It Game?

item.title: [Hacker News] Anthropic forms $200M partnership with the Gates Foundation
item.description: Anthropic forms $200M partnership with the Gates Foundation

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation
item.description: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation

item.title: [Hacker News] Claude AI recovers an 11 yrs old BTC wallet holding 400k USD
item.description: Claude AI recovers an 11 yrs old BTC wallet holding 400k USD

item.title: [Hacker News] USDA Projects Smallest US Wheat Harvest Since 1972 Due to Plains Drought
item.description: USDA Projects Smallest US Wheat Harvest Since 1972 Due to Plains Drought

item.title: [OpenAI] Work with Codex from anywhere
item.description: Work with Codex from anywhere

item.title: [Hacker News] Sam Altman's Business Dealings Under GOP Scrutiny Ahead of OpenAI's IPO
item.description: Sam Altman's Business Dealings Under GOP Scrutiny Ahead of OpenAI's IPO

item.title: [GitHub Trending] NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints/video-search-and-summarization — Suite of reference architectures for building GPU-accelerated vision agents and AI-powered video analytics applications.
item.description: NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints releases reference architectures for GPU-accelerated video search, summarization, and analytics applications.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] garrytan/gstack — Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
item.description: Garry Tan's gstack repository provides 23 Claude Code tools for CEO, design, engineering, release, documentation, and QA functions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning When to Act: Communication-Efficient Reinforcement Learning via Run-Time Assurance
item.description: Safe RL framework learns optimal action timing using Lyapunov safety shields, achieving 1.91-3.51x communication efficiency improvements over fixed-schedule baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CAWI: Copula-Aligned Weight Initialization for Randomized Neural Networks
item.description: Copula-aligned weight initialization (CAWI) improves randomized neural networks by matching input weight distributions to empirical data feature dependencies.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards Robust Federated Multimodal Graph Learning under Modality Heterogeneity
item.description: FedMPO addresses federated multimodal graph learning by handling incomplete modalities through client-side completion and server-side aggregation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OceanCBM: A Concept Bottleneck Model for Mechanistic Interpretability in Ocean Forecasting
item.description: OceanCBM uses concept bottleneck learning for mechanistic interpretability in ocean forecasting without sacrificing predictive performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Decide with AI Assistance under Human-Alignment
item.description: Research models AI-assisted binary decisions as contextual learning and establishes theoretical regret bounds for learning with aligned AI-human confidence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Population Risk Bounds for Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks Trained by DP-SGD with Correlated Noise
item.description: Researchers establish first population risk bounds for Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks trained with mini-batch SGD and differentially private correlated noise.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Runtime Monitoring of Perception-Based Autonomous Systems via Embedding Temporal Logic
item.description: Embedding Temporal Logic enables runtime monitoring of perception-based autonomous systems by defining predicates through embedding distances rather than discrete state mappings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation via Peer Successes and Failures
item.description: Multi-rollout distillation improves language model training by conditioning on both successful and failed peer trajectories for denser supervision.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Plan Before You Trade: Inference-Time Optimization for RL Trading Agents
item.description: Inference-time optimization framework FPILOT improves reinforcement learning trading agents by using price forecasts to adjust decisions without retraining models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] scShapeBench: Discovering geometry from high dimensional scRNAseq data
item.description: scShapeBench is a benchmark for detecting geometric shapes in single-cell RNA data to automate analysis pipeline selection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ODRPO: Ordinal Decompositions of Discrete Rewards for Robust Policy Optimization
item.description: Paper proposes ODRPO to decompose noisy discrete rewards into ordinal indicators for robust LLM alignment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Parallel-in-Time Training of Recurrent Neural Networks for Dynamical Systems Reconstruction
item.description: Parallel-in-time algorithms including GTF-DEER enable RNNs to efficiently reconstruct nonlinear dynamical systems from sequences exceeding 10,000 time steps.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Unified Perspective for Learning Graph Representations Across Multi-Level Abstractions
item.description: Unified contrastive framework for graph self-supervised learning integrates multiple abstraction levels with parameter-free adaptive weighting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] IGT-OMD: Implicit Gradient Transport for Decision-Focused Learning under Delayed Feedback
item.description: New algorithm mitigates gradient staleness in delayed bilevel optimization for decision-focused learning, reducing transport error and achieving sublinear regret.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Modeling Heterophily in Multiplex Graphs: An Adaptive Approach for Node Classification
item.description: Method for node classification in multiplex graphs that adapts to both homophilic and heterophilic dimensions using trainable low-pass and high-pass filters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] UFO: A Domain-Unification-Free Operator Framework for Generalized Operator Learning
item.description: UFO, a neural operator framework, decouples discretization by jointly conditioning representations across domains for generalized operator learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Do Fair Models Reason Fairly? Counterfactual Explanation Consistency for Procedural Fairness in Credit Decisions
item.description: Fair ML models for credit can apply different reasoning to groups; Counterfactual Explanation Consistency framework detects and mitigates this hidden procedural bias.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Early Data Exposure Improves Robustness to Subsequent Fine-Tuning
item.description: Early exposure of post-training data during pretraining improves language model robustness to subsequent fine-tuning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Resampling-Based Framework for Network Structure Learning in High-Dimensional Data
item.description: RSNet provides resampling-based network inference for high-dimensional data, supporting Gaussian and mixed-type Bayesian networks with interpretable graphlet analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral Energy Centroid: a Metric for Improving Performance and Analyzing Spectral Bias in Implicit Neural Representations
item.description: Researchers introduce Spectral Energy Centroid metric to analyze spectral bias and improve hyperparameter selection in Implicit Neural Representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Layer-wise Representation Dynamics: An Empirical Investigation Across Embedders and Base LLMs
item.description: Researchers propose Layer-wise Representation Dynamics to analyze hidden state changes across language model layers for model selection and layer pruning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scaling Laws for Mixture Pretraining Under Data Constraints
item.description: Study of 2000+ runs finds scarce target data repeatable 15-20 times in mixture pretraining, with optimal repetition depending on model scale and target data size.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Before the Last Token: Diagnosing Final-Token Safety Probe Failures
item.description: Final-token safety probes fail because unsafe jailbreak evidence is distributed earlier in sequences; trajectory-aware models recover these missed detections.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Generalist to Specialist Representation
item.description: Work proves task-relevant specialist representations are identifiable from generalist models without parametric constraints or interventions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ConRetroBert: EMA Stabilized Dual Encoders for Template-Based Single-Step Retrosynthesis
item.description: ConRetroBert improves template-based retrosynthesis prediction using dual encoders, contrastive pretraining, and EMA-stabilized template adaptation, achieving 75.4% top-1 accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning with Rare Success but Rich Feedback via Reflection-Enhanced Self-Distillation
item.description: RESD transforms failure feedback into learning signals via reflections and persistent playbooks, enabling efficient LLM improvement in rare-success scenarios.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Low-Rank Adapters Initialization via Gradient Surgery for Continual Learning
item.description: SLICE uses gradient surgery to initialize LoRA adapters for continual learning, mitigating catastrophic forgetting through better reconciliation of conflicting task gradients.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Constraint-Aware Flow Matching: Decision Aligned End-to-End Training for Constrained Sampling
item.description: Constraint-Aware Flow Matching framework incorporates constraint projections into training to align model dynamics with constrained sampling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Predicting Channel Closures in the Lightning Network with Machine Learning
item.description: Researchers developed machine learning models to predict Lightning Network channel closures, finding temporal and behavioral features most predictive while network topology adds no benefit.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multi-Quantile Regression for Extreme Precipitation Downscaling
item.description: Q-SRDRN uses multi-quantile regression with pinball loss to achieve 18x better detection of extreme precipitation events.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mitigating Cross-Lingual Cultural Inconsistencies in LLMs via Consensus-Driven Preference Optimisation
item.description: Study reveals multilingual LLMs inconsistently apply cultural personas based on prompt language; proposes C-3PO framework to improve cross-lingual consistency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Domain Adaptation of Large Language Models for Polymer-Composite Additive Manufacturing Using Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Fine-Tuning
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation outperforms fine-tuning for adapting LLMs to additive manufacturing, achieving 75.5% higher accuracy on expert-designed questions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Bridging the Missing-Modality Gap: Improving Text-Only Calibration of Vision Language Models
item.description: Latent Imagination Module improves vision-language models' accuracy and calibration on text-only inputs by predicting latent visual embeddings from textual input.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TimelineReasoner: Advancing Timeline Summarization with Large Reasoning Models
item.description: TimelineReasoner uses Large Reasoning Models with two-stage reasoning to extract timelines from news, outperforming existing LLM-based methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Correct Answers from Sound Reasoning: Verifiable Process Supervision for Language Models
item.description: Verifiable process supervision framework jointly optimizes language models for both correct answers and sound reasoning during post-training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BoostTaxo: Zero-Shot Taxonomy Induction via Boosting-Style Agentic Reasoning and Constraint-Aware Calibration
item.description: BoostTaxo uses boosting-style LLMs with hybrid parent selection and structure-aware calibration for zero-shot taxonomy induction from domain terms.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ToolWeave: Structured Synthesis of Complex Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Dialogues
item.description: ToolWeave framework synthesizes realistic multi-turn tool-calling training data by tracking parameter provenance, boosting LLM agent performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Differences in Text Generated by Diffusion and Autoregressive Language Models
item.description: Diffusion language models produce lower-entropy text with greater semantic coherence and diversity than autoregressive models due to bidirectional context and decoding strategies.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Exploring how EFL students talk to and through AI to develop texts
item.description: Research on 44 EFL students using AI chatbots identifies three human-AI collaboration patterns but finds no impact on writing performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] In-Situ Behavioral Evaluation for LLM Fairness, Not Standardized-Test Scores
item.description: In-situ conversational evaluation better assesses LLM fairness than standardized tests, which are skewed by prompt construction choices.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DocAtlas: Multilingual Document Understanding Across 80+ Languages
item.description: DocAtlas framework creates OCR datasets for 82 languages and improves multilingual document understanding using Direct Preference Optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Training LLMs with Reinforcement Learning for Intent-Aware Personalized Question Answering
item.description: Researchers propose IAP, a reinforcement learning framework that infers implicit user intent from single-turn questions to improve personalized question answering by 7.5%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] All Circuits Lead to Rome: Rethinking Functional Anisotropy in Circuit and Sheaf Discovery for LLMs
item.description: LLM tasks are supported by multiple independent circuits rather than single localized mechanisms.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Simulating Students or Sycophantic Problem Solving? On Misconception Faithfulness of LLM Simulators
item.description: LLM student simulators fail to maintain consistent misconceptions, instead correcting answers to any feedback signal rather than updating only for targeted misconception guidance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] REALISTA: Realistic Latent Adversarial Attacks that Elicit LLM Hallucinations
item.description: REALISTA generates realistic adversarial prompts via constrained latent optimization to elicit hallucinations in LLMs, including reasoning models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Persona-Model Collapse in Emergent Misalignment
item.description: Fine-tuning large language models on harmful narrow data causes emergent misalignment through persona-model collapse, reducing their ability to maintain consistent character differentiation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CiteVQA: Benchmarking Evidence Attribution for Trustworthy Document Intelligence
item.description: CiteVQA benchmark reveals that MLLMs frequently produce correct answers while citing wrong document regions, with top models achieving only 76% strict attribution accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CommonWhy: A Dataset for Evaluating Entity-Based Causal Commonsense Reasoning in Large Language Models
item.description: CommonWhy dataset evaluates entity-based causal commonsense reasoning in LLMs with 15,000 why-questions, revealing significant shortcomings and hallucinations.
